commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete pod -n yanxi-validation gpu-smoke gpu-smoke-cdi --force --grace-period=0 --ignore-not-found=true 2>&1 | tail -3'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://yanxi-validation-788668107894/manifests/gpu-smoke.yaml /tmp/gpu-smoke.yaml && kubectl --context ohio apply -f /tmp/gpu-smoke.yaml'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pod -n yanxi-validation gpu-smoke -o wide'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio logs -n yanxi-validation gpu-smoke 2>&1 | tail -30'
